---
pagetitle: "Traway Analytics — Yash Tiwari"
page-layout: custom
include-before-body: ../_partials/case-study-template.html
---

```{=html}
<!-- ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
     TRAWAY BRIDGE PAGE
     Introduces the Traway analysis and links out to traway.live
     Full interactive analysis lives at the external URL.
═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ -->
<div class="case-banner">

  <a href="../projects.html" class="back-link">
    <svg width="14" height="14" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round">
      <line x1="19" y1="12" x2="5" y2="12"/><polyline points="12 19 5 12 12 5"/>
    </svg>
    All Projects
  </a>

  <div class="case-tag">Analytics · Entrepreneurship</div>

  <h1 class="case-title">Traway Operations Analytics</h1>

  <p class="case-subtitle">
    Cohort analysis, pricing segmentation, and retention modeling for a
    student-led mobility startup — turning 3,200 customers into actionable
    growth levers.
  </p>

  <div class="case-meta-row">
    <div class="case-meta-item">
      <span class="case-meta-key">Timeline</span>
      <span class="case-meta-val">Dec 2022 – Jul 2024</span>
    </div>
    <div class="case-meta-item">
      <span class="case-meta-key">Role</span>
      <span class="case-meta-val">Co-founder &amp; CEO</span>
    </div>
    <div class="case-meta-item">
      <span class="case-meta-key">Stack</span>
      <span class="case-meta-val">Python · SQL · Regression · EDA</span>
    </div>
    <div class="case-meta-item">
      <span class="case-meta-key">Outcome</span>
      <span class="case-meta-val">60%+ retention · 3× AOV lift</span>
    </div>
  </div>

</div>
<!-- ── END BANNER ── -->


<div class="case-body">

  <div class="case-section">
    <div class="case-section-label">Overview</div>
    <p>
      Traway was a student-led mobility and events startup based in Srinagar, India.
      As Co-founder and CEO, I built and scaled the venture alongside TheLoudKitchens,
      leading a cross-functional team of 10+ members and executing 175+ events over
      18 months. The analytics work focused on understanding customer behaviour at the
      cohort level — who stayed, who churned, and what pricing interventions could move
      the needle on retention and average order value.
    </p>
  </div>

  <!-- Full analysis link card -->
  <div class="case-section">
    <div class="case-section-label">Full Analysis</div>

    <div style="
      border: 1px solid var(--border);
      border-radius: 12px;
      padding: 32px 28px;
      background: var(--card-bg);
      max-width: 560px;
      margin-bottom: 32px;
    ">
      <div style="font-size:10px; font-weight:600; letter-spacing:0.1em; text-transform:uppercase; color:var(--text-muted); margin-bottom:12px;">
        FULL ANALYSIS
      </div>
      <div style="font-size:16px; font-weight:600; color:var(--text); margin-bottom:8px; line-height:1.4;">
        Traway Operations, Pricing &amp; Customer Analytics
      </div>
      <div style="font-size:13px; color:var(--text-muted); margin-bottom:20px; line-height:1.5;">
        Cohort tables, regression outputs, RFM segmentation, and pricing models —
        full interactive analysis hosted externally.
      </div>
      <a href="https://traway.live" target="_blank" rel="noopener" class="btn-primary" style="display:inline-flex; align-items:center; gap:6px; text-decoration:none;">
        View Full Analysis
        <svg width="14" height="14" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round">
          <path d="M18 13v6a2 2 0 0 1-2 2H5a2 2 0 0 1-2-2V8a2 2 0 0 1 2-2h6"/>
          <polyline points="15 3 21 3 21 9"/><line x1="10" y1="14" x2="21" y2="3"/>
        </svg>
      </a>
    </div>

    <!-- Result stat cards -->
    <div class="result-grid">
      <div class="result-card">
        <span class="result-num">60%+</span>
        <span class="result-label">Customer retention rate</span>
      </div>
      <div class="result-card">
        <span class="result-num">3×</span>
        <span class="result-label">Increase in average order value</span>
      </div>
      <div class="result-card">
        <span class="result-num">175+</span>
        <span class="result-label">Events executed over 18 months</span>
      </div>
    </div>

    <p style="margin-top:24px; font-size:12px; color:var(--text-muted);">
      Full interactive analysis including cohort tables, regression outputs,
      and pricing models hosted at traway.live
    </p>

  </div>

</div><!-- /case-body -->

<div class="toast" id="toast">✓ Copied to clipboard</div>
```
